title: I Release Remaining Doubt and Allow Deep Trust
subtitle: An energy statement for clearing the last layer of financial doubt
excerpt: A short energy statement for when financial progress is real but the underlying trust hasn't yet fully settled. The release names the residual worry; the allow names where the practice points instead.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 64 release-and-allow structure of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when financial things are moving in the right direction but a residual layer of doubt or 'what if' thinking is still present underneath the progress.

content.text: A short energy statement for the last layer of financial doubt. Use it when the progress is real (savings are growing, the income is coming in, the business is moving) but somewhere underneath, the trust has not fully caught up. The statement names that gap directly and points the energy toward settled certainty.
I am ready to release every remaining doubt about lasting wealth. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow deep, settled trust in the constancy of wealth. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 64 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
